_doc: Weekly demand per account, SPLIT into booked vs upside. 'booked' = what this account has actually demonstrated it takes. 'upside' = the increment we HOPE for and have not yet seen. The planner runs both scenarios; production should be built on booked + whatever upside is cancel-protected, never on upside alone. This split exists because the flat pre-7/16 version encoded the stockout-corrected 'latent ~1,650/mo' estimate as if it were bookable, which is ~2x anything ever shipped (Mar 206 / Apr 396 / May 737 / Jun 786).
_reconciliation_warning: Bottom-up booked (~246 cs/wk = ~1,060/mo) still exceeds top-down actual throughput (Jun 786/mo = ~183 cs/wk) by ~35%. Some of that gap is real stockout suppression; some is accounts not ordering every single week. The planner reports this gap on every run — do not ignore it.

accounts.note: lead acct; ordered 28 BUF on 6/4, supply-trimmed to 17 — using the ORDER (demand), not the constrained delivery
GR corrected down from a one-week 5/19 spike (was reading 19)

ONLINE/DTC — high ceiling. The old file carried 16/16/16 with the note 'ramping 6->16, set above recent; raise as it proves'. It has NOT yet proved: 6 is demonstrated, the +10 is the hope. Move it to booked when the orders show up.
orders ~3/3/3 occasionally; 6/4 order was MISSED (owe a delivery); excludes windows we couldn't supply. OPEN ITEM: confirm the 12-cs order.
ongoing demos + show spikes. Real consumption, lumpy timing.

4 doors. THE BIG ASSUMPTION — 90 cs/wk, ~25% of the whole demand book, sitting entirely in upside. Kendall 6/16: ongoing 30/SKU is real and recent low volume was OUT-OF-STOCK suppression, not soft demand, and 'a reorder is materializing'. It has not yet materialized, and we do not have Fairway's true un-suppressed rate. Booked stays 0 until a reorder PO lands; then move the demonstrated amount over. The 6/2 opening (60/SKU) was one-time shelf-fill and is deliberately excluded.
PAUSED — consignment (La Grocere). Re-activate when it resumes.

NEW distributor (Union Market) on the 'eco' channel — 30-day floor (doors.json serviced_by 'eco'; run_calendar minShelfLifeDaysAtDelivery.eco). Starts Aug 2026; no PO yet, so booked=0 and NO quantity is invented. When a real PO lands, flip active:true and move the demonstrated amount into booked — same mechanism as Fairway's upside. Channel is authoritative in doors.json; this row only carries the (currently zero) quantity.
LA / first West Coast. NOT recurring demand — the 100 cs restock is handled as a DIVERSION off the Jul-13 run in run_calendar.json, not as weekly demand. Do not double-count.
